message:
fix: metadata capture, steer race, processNext abort guard

Round 9 review fixes:

1. submitGoal captures metadata as a local before the try block so
   the finally writes "interrupted" to the old session's metadata,
   not the new one created by /clear.

2. messageAgent clears handle.result BEFORE publishing the steer
   message, closing the race where a result arrives between publish
   and the clear.

3. processNext checks signal.aborted and bus.connected in its while
   loop so it stops cleanly when the process is shutting down instead
   of attempting to publish on a disconnected bus.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
